phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Pedra da Galé?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH PEHD-ruh DUH guh-LEH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Pedra da Galé.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PEHD-ruh DUH guh-LEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Pedra da Galé.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Pedra da Galé.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH PEHD-ruh DUH guh-LEH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Pedra da Galé.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the main stairs are

phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuhng UHSH SHKAH-duhsh preen-see-PEYESH?
